name: Haikou Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Haikou coverage with a focus on old-port city texture, north-Hainan pacing, and when Haikou adds substance instead of delay.
fullBio: The Haikou Editorial Desk maintains guides and planning coverage related to Haikou. Its focus is helping readers understand when Haikou should be treated as a real stop, how Qilou and the older city fit into a broader Hainan route, and when a north-to-south island sequence is stronger than a pure resort handoff.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for pacing realism, airport-to-city logic, and whether the advice still reflects current Haikou and wider Hainan trip-planning conditions.
seoTitle: Haikou Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Haikou guides and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
